name: github-actions-ci
description:
GitHub Actions CI: validate (lint + type-check + test + build) on push to main + manual dispatch. Uses pnpm cache, --frozen-lockfile, Node 20. Pattern source: LuxeBook .github/workflows/deploy.yml validate job.

Deliberately runs on PUSH only (not PR triggers) — local pre-commit + pre-push hooks (git-hooks integration) catch issues before they reach the PR, saving GitHub Actions minutes.
